title: <div>  •  Cinematic Replay: Use Unity’s Cinemachine for post-game replays, with
content:
• Cinematic Replay: Use Unity’s Cinemachine for post-game replays, with dynamic camera swoops and Archivist narration. Cache replays locally for offline viewing.
Optimization:
• Run AI hint engine on-device using TensorFlow Lite for low latency.
• Compress voice assets and stream only active persona to save storage.
• Limit replay rendering to 30 FPS to conserve battery.
Challenges to Mitigate:
• Ensure AI prompts are concise and contextually relevant to avoid breaking flow.
• Test avatar animations for performance on low-end devices.
5. Family & Social Engagement
Approach:
• Player Profiles: Store profiles in Firebase, including stats and archetypes (Strategist, Trickster). Display as 3D cards in a profile menu.
• Family Chronicle: Log match narratives in Firestore, rendered as a 3D journal with era-specific art. Allow export to PDF for sharing.
• Legacy Mode: Build a 2D world map UI (Unity UI Toolkit) for campaign tracking, with 3D era transitions for immersion.
• Asynchronous Multiplayer: Use Socket.io for move syncing, with push notifications for opponent turns. Include in-app chat with pre-set emotes for simplicity.
